case_title: HOUSING AUTHORITY OF SAN FRANCISCO vs. WRIGHT, LINDA et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT WRIGHT, LINDA DOES 1 TO 20 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WRIGHT, LINDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 72 BLYTHDALE AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94134 $3,534.30 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,534.30, LEASE FORFEITED, PLAINTIFF WAIVES COSTS AND ATTORNEY FEES.
